description_long: This hardware store consists of two main rectangular structures, with the larger building featuring a slanted roof and a prominent glass-fronted entrance area. The facade combines gray and brown tones, with several large windows and a distinct two-story glass section at one corner, likely serving as the main entrance or display area. The secondary structure, adjacent to the main building, appears to be a storage or garage unit with a simple, flat roof and minimal detailing. The main building's exterior walls are clad in a mix of materials, including what appears to be wood or composite panels and concrete or masonry. The windows are large and modern, providing ample natural light and visibility into the store. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with clean lines and a practical layout suitable for an urban commercial environment.
description: A modern hardware store with a slanted roof, large glass entrance, and an adjacent storage or garage unit. The facade features a mix of gray, brown, and blue tones with prominent windows and a clean, functional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slanted roof of the main building and the adjacent rectangular storage unit.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat backs of both the main building and the storage unit, with minimal window or door features.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance with large glass windows, the two-story glass corner, and the detailed facade of the main building.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the glass-fronted entrance area and the relationship between the main building and the storage unit.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a prominent glass entrance at one corner, large windows along the main facade, and a secondary structure adjacent to the main building. The entrance area is visually distinct with a two-story glass section, while the rest of the facade is organized with regular window placements and a mix of materials.
